initialize(address,address).details: Called once by the factory at deployment time.

swap(uint256,uint256,address).details: Split into helper functions to avoid "stack too deep" during compilation.

burn(address).notice: Burns LP tokens held by this contract and returns underlying tokens to `to`. Called by the Router (LP tokens must be transferred to this contract first).

mint(address).notice: Mints LP tokens for the liquidity implicitly deposited (tokens must be transferred to this contract before calling). Called by the Router.

skim(address).notice: Forces balances to match reserves, sending any excess to `to`.

swap(uint256,uint256,address).notice: Swaps tokens. Caller must have already transferred the input token to this contract; this function sends `amount0Out`/`amount1Out` to `to`. Called by the Router.
